author: ljuckett
body:
## PR description:
Overhaul of the output folder structure for Tracker DQM. Moving towards a detector-structure-based DQM system as seen in Run3, rather than separating DQM histograms into different folders for each product.
Fixed some histograms that were not filling properly and removed some that were not helpful for DQM.
Output of DQM available [here](https://cernbox.cern.ch/files/link/public/5RxHnXE4JymEmQ9). Contains both a "master" and "restructure" file for comparison purposes
Updated README.

[Presentation](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1628660/sessions/660498/attachments/3260480/5821281/TkDQM_Ph2_ideas_Apr26.pdf) by @alaperto with motivations for changes
[Presentation](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1698995/contributions/7145383/attachments/3297982/5898670/DQM_folder_restructure.pdf) with a brief overview of changes

#### Folder changes:

- All DQM plugins previously using `TrackerPhase2OT<product>` as a top folder are changed to use `OuterTracker` (exception of TrackerPhase2OTL1Track)
- All DQM plugins previously using `TrackerPhase2IT<product>` as a top folder are changed to use `InnerTracker`
- Added shells and half-cylinders to the inner tracker folder structure **in DQM and Validation** (now split into mI/mO/pI/pO)
  - Added a helper function to get the shell name of a det
- Added wheels to inner tracker and outer tracker endcap folder structure **in DQM only** (now contains both `Ring_<x>` and `Wheel_<x>` folders)
  - Added a helper function to get folder path for wheels
  - In order to book and fill all DQM layer histograms in both Rings and Wheels, booking and filling is looped over twice in endcap modules with the Ring folder as the first book/fill and the Wheel folder as the second.
- Endcap side1/side2 changed to Endcap PLUS or Endcap MINUS
- Moved "Global Position" histograms into a dedicated `/Positions` folder

#### DQM Histogram Changes

- All_Histogram_Names_Now_Look_Like_This
- Any "numberof" or "n" or generally counting histograms renamed to "Num_"
- RecHit histograms have "Cluster" removed from their names, now only use "RecHit"
- All histograms now specify the product in the histogram name & title
- Expanded x range of Num_Hit_Detectors_Per_Layer **todo: cooked it too far put it to like 3000 max**

#### Inner Tracker histogram changes

- Cluster_LocalPosition_XY removed: not useful **todo whoops i forgot**
- RecHit_LocalPosition_XY removed: not useful **todo whoops i forgot**
- Digi_LocalPosition_XY removed: not useful **todo whoops i forgot**
- Fixed scale of Digi Global Position histograms
- Fixed typo in NumberOfClustersLayer
- **temp** Added XY/RZ/XZ/ZPhi histograms per shell to test shell separation **will remove once shell separation is reviewed**

#### Outer Tracker histogram changes

- Cluster_LocalPosition_XY removed: not useful
- Num_Clusters_Barrel moved to /Barrel folder
- RecHit GlobalPosition_perlayer_XY removed: broken and not useful even if working
- RecHit LocalPosition_XY removed: not useful
- Num_RecHits fixed (previously did not fill)
- Num_RecHits_layer_P fixed (previously filled with both P and S data)
- Num_RecHits_layer_S added
- L1Clusters: folder migrated to detector-style structure
- L1Stub: folder migrated to detector-style structure
- Digi_LocalPosition_XY removed: not useful **todo: whoops i forgot**

## PR validation:

Comparison of old and new root file underway, PR in draft until feedback (and also once I have fixed the todos.....)
title: Phase-2 Tracker DQM folder restructure
